/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/odometry_system_gui.dir/odometry_system_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odometry_system_gui.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odometry_system_gui.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o odometry_system_gui  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
